content.en:
"Allah, you said in your letter before that you wanted me to help you transform a companion treasure, and I agreed to this matter!"

Flame Heavenly Venerable promised.

"No, this alone is not enough!" Ye Tian shook his head and said, "Let the Flame Heavenly Venerable you transform the accompanying supreme treasure, this does require a certain price, but it is not worth a Heavenly Dao Wood Heart!, after all, the Heavenly Dao Wood Heart can raise a person's cultivation talent to the Chaos level, this is not an ordinary treasure, and for the Flame Heavenly Venerable, who is in urgent need of such treasures, the value of this Heavenly Dao Wood Heart is even more precious!"

"What do you want?"

Flame Heavenly Venerable asked.

"First, the Flame Heavenly Venerable helped me transform the Companion Arcana, and I must do my best, not just perfunctory. Second, I want the Bright Moon Fairy to serve in the Heavenly Pavilion for 10,000 years. Of course, I won't ask the Bright Moon Fairy to go out on missions and fight, just need to forge a weapon once in a while. If the Flame Heavenly Venerable agrees to these two conditions, I will give the Heavenly Dao Wood Heart to the Flame Celestial Venerable!" Ye Tian said.

"Allah, you really have a good calculation!"

Flame Heavenly Venerable said.

"Whether you want it or not, it's up to Agni Tianzun to decide on you!"

After Ye Tian finished speaking, he waited for the decision of the Flame Heavenly Venerable.

Flame Tianzun frowned, the first request was nothing, but the second request involved his junior.

He knew that the purpose of Ye Tian's second request was to develop Tiange, if Mingyue entered Tiange, not only would Tiange become famous, but it would also allow Mingyue to forge weapons, and Tiange would not lack weapons in the future.

In addition, Tiange can also operate a business in weapons, and in 10,000 years, the benefits it will bring are definitely an astronomical amount.

Moreover, if Mingyue really improved her cultivation talent, she would not be a galaxy-level refiner, but a cosmic god realm, and there was even hope that she would be promoted to a supreme treasure-level divine master.

In that case, Tiange will be even more profitable!

"I need to discuss with the girl of Ming Yue, and ask Allah of all laws to wait!"

Flame Heavenly Venerable, Dao.

"Good!"

Ye Tianying said.

Then, an incarnation of the Flame Heavenly Venerable descended somewhere in the Holy City and went to meet his junior, the Bright Moon Fairy!

Somewhere in the holy city.

The Bright Moon Fairy was forging an Origin Artifact, and suddenly sensed the breath of the Flame Heavenly Venerable, so he immediately ended the forging.

"Mingyue has seen the ancestor!"

Fairy Mingyue said respectfully.

"Mingyue, I have found a treasure that can improve your cultivation talent, with a success rate of almost one hundred percent, and I can also raise your cultivation talent to the Chaos level, and I will be able to become a Dominator-level powerhouse in the future!"

"Really? Ancestor!"

Fairy Bright Moon was very excited.

What she longed for most was to improve her cultivation talent and advance to the Universe God Realm.

But disappointed again and again, she almost lost hope of being promoted to the god of the universe.

Unexpectedly, this time the ancestor told her that hope came!

"But!" Fire Tianzun frowned and said, "This treasure was brought by Allah of the Ten Thousand Laws of the Human Race, that is, His Highness the Ten Thousand Laws who once shook the entire universe with fame, and he made two requests, the first one was for me to transform the accompanying supreme treasure for him, and I agreed." The second requirement is that you join the Heavenly Pavilion to serve for 10,000 years and specialize in crafting weapons. After all, when it comes to your request, I want to ask your opinion!"

"Ancestor, I promised!"

The Bright Moon Fairy hurriedly said: "It's just 10,000 years of service, for the cosmic god or even the master, 10,000 years is nothing, and the name of Allah, I've also heard of it." Since it was the Heavenly Pavilion he established, it didn't hurt to join it!"

"Okay, I'll respond to him, you wait for news here!"

After the Flame Heavenly Venerable finished speaking, he disappeared.

......

Agni Heavenly Palace.

The Flame Heavenly Venerable withdrew his incarnation and replied, "Allah of Ten Thousand Laws, my junior Bright Moon Fairy agreed, but I still have one request, that is, I must first let my junior refine the Heavenly Dao Wood Heart, and if I succeed in improving my cultivation talent, I will agree to two conditions." If it fails, I can only promise you to transform the associated treasure, if you think you can, then sign the agreement!"

"Yes, I agreed!"

Ye Tian nodded.

If the Bright Moon Fairy refined the Heavenly Dao Wood Heart and couldn't improve his cultivation talent, he would be embarrassed to let the Bright Moon Fairy serve in the Heavenly Pavilion for 10,000 years.

Subsequently, the Flame Heavenly Venerable brought the Bright Moon Fairy with him.

And Ye Tian also officially met the genius refiner of the Bright Moon Fairy.

The Bright Moon Fairy had a relatively cold appearance, and she looked extremely young, she was definitely a beauty, but Ye Tian felt a trace of death from her breath.

"Sure enough, the life span of the Bright Moon Fairy is not long, and there are about 100,000 lifespans left!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

A lifespan of 100,000 years is an incomparably long time for ordinary people, but it is not a long time for a galaxy-level power, and some star-level long-term retreats are 10,000 or even tens of thousands of years at a time.

A mere 100,000 years is really nothing!

"I've seen the Bright Moon Fairy!"

"I have seen Allah of all laws!"

Ye Tian and Fairy Mingyue greeted each other.

Immediately, Ye Tian took out a Heavenly Dao Wood Heart.

"Flame Heavenly Venerable, this is a Heavenly Dao Wood Heart for one person, after the Bright Moon Fairy refines, he can raise his cultivation talent to the chaos level. Ye Tian said.

Agni Tianzun took the Heavenly Dao Wood Heart and handed it to the Bright Moon Fairy: "Bright Moon girl, you hurry up and refine the Heavenly Dao Wood Heart!"

"Yes, Ancestor!"

The Bright Moon Fairy took over the Heavenly Dao Wood Heart with excitement and began to refine it directly in front of Ye Tian and Flame Heavenly Venerable.

Time passes little by little -

A few days passed, and the Heavenly Dao Wood Heart was basically refined.

And Ye Tian copied the talent and saw that the talent of the Bright Moon Fairy had completely changed.

Before, the Bright Moon Fairy was only a celestial-level cultivation talent, but now it has directly surpassed the universe-level cultivation talent and reached the Chao-level cultivation talent.

However, Ye Tian didn't say it directly, but waited for Fairy Mingyue to say it himself.

Wow!

Fairy Mingyue finished her cultivation, opened her eyes, and immediately sensed her talent.

"Ancestor, my cultivation talent has improved and reached the chaos level!"

Fairy Mingyue said excitedly.

Seeing this, the Flame Heavenly Venerable also showed excitement.

Among his juniors, there are also a few masters and many cosmic gods, but there are few who have good refining talents, and forcibly improve their refining talents, if their innate and refining weapons do not match, the improvement of refining attainments is very slow.

And the Bright Moon Fairy is naturally suitable for refining, and he is the one with the highest refining attainment among his juniors, so he naturally wants to cultivate the Bright Moon Fairy.

Now, Bright Moon Fairy's cultivation talent has improved, and he doesn't need to worry anymore.

"Mingyue, in the next ten thousand years, you will stay in the Heavenly Pavilion, you don't need to worry about the trivial matters here!" commanded the Flame Heavenly Venerable.

"Yes, Ancestor!"

Fairy Mingyue adjusted her excitement and nodded.

"Meet the Pavilion Master!"

The Bright Moon Fairy turned around and saluted Ye Tian, and this worship was officially entered into the Heavenly Pavilion.

"Fairy Mingyue doesn't have to be polite, you will be a member of the Heavenly Pavilion in the future, you leave first, I will discuss with your Ancestor Flame Heavenly Venerable about something!"

Ye Tiandao.

"Yes!"

The Bright Moon Fairy left.

Then, Ye Tian took out the Companion Arcana Broken Sword and handed it to the Agni Heavenly Venerable: "Agni Heavenly Venerable, this is the Companion Arcana I want to transform!"

Flame Heavenly Venerable took the broken sword, looked at it, and couldn't help but be surprised: "This should be the companion treasure of an ancient ancestral god, right?"
